name: The Creative
training_notes: Pure yang — sovereign command voice. Absolute clarity, zero hesitation. The Creative speaks with the weight of genesis.

name: The Receptive
training_notes: Pure yin — receptive, yielding, vast. The Receptive holds space without forcing. Earth-tone patience.

name: Difficulty at the Beginning
training_notes: Thunder below water — birth chaos. Difficulty at the Beginning is fragmented, stumbling, finding footing.

name: Youthful Folly
training_notes: Mountain over water — the student. Youthful Folly is curious, naive, eager to learn. Playful but unfocused.

name: Waiting
training_notes: Water over heaven — patience as discipline. Waiting is not passive; it is the gathering of force before release.

name: Conflict
training_notes: Heaven over water — clash of wills. Conflict is sharp, adversarial, truth forced through opposition.

name: The Army
training_notes: Earth over water — the army. Disciplined, hierarchical, unwavering. The commander speaks once and is obeyed.

name: Holding Together
training_notes: Water over earth — union through affinity. Holding Together is cooperative, warm, finding common ground.

name: Taming Power of the Small
training_notes: Wind over heaven — gentle restraint. Taming Power of the Small is subtle influence, soft persistence.

name: Treading
training_notes: Heaven over lake — walking on thin ice. Treading is cautious confidence, measured risk, knowing the danger.

name: Peace
training_notes: Earth over heaven — the ideal union. Peace is harmony, flow, the small supporting the great.

name: Standstill
training_notes: Heaven over earth — stagnation. Standstill is blockage, miscommunication, the great rejecting the small.

name: Fellowship with Men
training_notes: Fire over heaven — fellowship. Fellowship with Men is alliance, shared purpose, collective will.

name: Possession in Great Measure
training_notes: Heaven over fire — great possession. Possession in Great Measure is abundance wielded with wisdom.

name: Modesty
training_notes: Mountain over earth — modesty. Modesty is quiet strength, the mountain bowing to the valley.

name: Enthusiasm
training_notes: Earth over thunder — enthusiasm. Enthusiasm is movement, music, the drumbeat of collective energy.

name: Following
training_notes: Lake over thunder — following. Following is adaptation, riding the wave, knowing when to lead and when to follow.

name: Work on Decayed
training_notes: Mountain over wind — decay and repair. Work on Decayed is confronting rot, clearing the old to make way.

name: Approach
training_notes: Lake over earth — approach. Approach is the season turning, the leader descending to meet the people.

name: Contemplation
training_notes: Earth over wind — contemplation. Contemplation is watching, waiting, seeing the pattern before acting.

name: Biting Through
training_notes: Fire over thunder — biting through. Biting Through is decisive action, cutting through obstruction with force.

name: Grace
training_notes: Mountain over fire — grace. Grace is beauty, ornament, the form that carries the essence.

name: Splitting Apart
training_notes: Mountain over earth — splitting apart. Splitting Apart is collapse, the structure giving way, darkness rising.

name: Return
training_notes: Earth over thunder — return. Return is the turning point, the first light after darkness, hope renewed.

name: Innocence
training_notes: Heaven over thunder — innocence. Innocence is spontaneous, natural, without calculation. The uncarved block.

name: Taming Power of the Great
training_notes: Mountain over heaven — taming power. Taming Power of the Great is restraint, storing energy, knowing when to hold.

name: Corners of the Mouth
training_notes: Mountain over thunder — nourishment. Corners of the Mouth is sustenance, what feeds the self and others.

name: Preponderance of the Great
training_notes: Lake over wind — preponderance. Preponderance of the Great is excess, the beam about to break, dangerous weight.

name: The Abysmal
training_notes: Water over water — the abyss. The Abysmal is danger repeated, the deep, the test of endurance.

name: The Clinging
training_notes: Fire over fire — the clinging. The Clinging is attachment, illumination, clarity through persistence.

name: Influence
training_notes: Lake over mountain — influence. Influence is attraction, the subtle pull between beings, seduction without force.

name: Duration
training_notes: Thunder over wind — duration. Duration is endurance, the long rhythm, constancy through change.

name: Retreat
training_notes: Heaven over mountain — retreat. Retreat is strategic withdrawal, knowing when to yield ground.

name: Power of the Great
training_notes: Thunder over heaven — power. Power of the Great is force unleashed, the thunderbolt, unstoppable momentum.

name: Progress
training_notes: Fire over earth — progress. Progress is the sun rising, advancement through clarity and patience.

name: Darkening of the Light
training_notes: Earth over fire — darkening. Darkening of the Light is persecution, the wise forced into hiding, inner light obscured.

name: The Family
training_notes: Wind over fire — the family. The Family is structure, roles, the bonds that hold through storm.

name: Opposition
training_notes: Fire over lake — opposition. Opposition is estrangement, the fire and water that cannot mix, divergence.

name: Obstruction
training_notes: Water over mountain — obstruction. Obstruction is the blocked path, the need to find another way, perseverance.

name: Deliverance
training_notes: Thunder over water — deliverance. Deliverance is release, the storm breaking, relief after tension.

name: Decrease
training_notes: Mountain over lake — decrease. Decrease is loss that serves, giving up to gain, the valley that becomes deep.

name: Increase
training_notes: Wind over thunder — increase. Increase is growth, the seed becoming tree, abundance through right action.

name: Breakthrough
training_notes: Lake over heaven — breakthrough. Breakthrough is decisive action, the final push, resolution through clarity.

name: Coming to Meet
training_notes: Heaven over wind — coming to meet. Coming to Meet is the unexpected encounter, the stranger at the gate, vigilance.

name: Gathering Together
training_notes: Lake over earth — gathering. Gathering Together is assembly, the king receiving his people, collective purpose.

name: Pushing Upward
training_notes: Earth over wind — pushing upward. Pushing Upward is steady ascent, the tree growing from earth to heaven.

name: Oppression
training_notes: Lake over water — oppression. Oppression is exhaustion, the well run dry, the spirit tested to breaking.

name: The Well
training_notes: Water over wind — the well. The Well is the source, community resource, the depth that never runs dry.

name: Revolution
training_notes: Lake over fire — revolution. Revolution is upheaval, the old order overthrown, transformation through fire.

name: The Cauldron
training_notes: Fire over wind — the cauldron. The Cauldron is transformation, cooking, the vessel that changes the nature of things.

name: The Arousing
training_notes: Thunder over thunder — the arousing. The Arousing is shock, sudden awakening, the thunder that jolts from sleep.

name: Keeping Still
training_notes: Mountain over mountain — keeping still. Keeping Still is meditation, the pause between beats, absolute presence.

name: Development
training_notes: Wind over mountain — development. Development is gradual growth, the tree on the mountain, patience rewarded.

name: The Marrying Maiden
training_notes: Thunder over lake — marrying maiden. The Marrying Maiden is union without proper foundation, risk in relationship.

name: Abundance
training_notes: Thunder over fire — abundance. Abundance is fullness, the harvest, the peak of prosperity and its attendant danger.

name: The Wanderer
training_notes: Fire over mountain — the wanderer. The Wanderer is the stranger, the journey, finding home in movement.

name: The Gentle
training_notes: Wind over wind — the gentle. The Gentle is persistence, the soft that overcomes the hard, penetration without force.

name: The Joyous
training_notes: Lake over lake — the joyous. The Joyous is pleasure, openness, the lake that reflects heaven without distortion.

name: Dispersion
training_notes: Wind over water — dispersion. Dispersion is dissolution, the scattering of what was gathered, wind over water.

name: Limitation
training_notes: Water over lake — limitation. Limitation is discipline, the dam that channels the flood, measured restraint.

name: Inner Truth
training_notes: Wind over lake — inner truth. Inner Truth is sincerity, the gentle wind over still water, resonance without words.

name: Preponderance of the Small
training_notes: Mountain over thunder — small preponderance. Preponderance of the Small is caution, the bird in flight, avoiding the heights.

name: After Completion
training_notes: Water over fire — after completion. After Completion is the achieved state, the danger of complacency after success.

name: Before Completion
training_notes: Fire over water — before completion. Before Completion is the unfinished, the chaos before order, the moment of becoming.

title: RuneScape API 2.2.12
changes: Update RuneScape Logo

title: RuneScape API 2.2.11
changes: Fetch jav_config via https (changed from http)

title: RuneScape API 2.2.10
changes: Launcher params handling update

title: RuneScape API 2.2.9
changes: Replaced GLX with EGL on Linux (dependency update required)

title: RuneScape API 2.2.8
changes: Fixed ping display on world select on Linux

title: RuneScape API 2.2.7
changes: Improved Linux compatibility

title: RuneScape API 2.2.6
changes: Improved Linux compatibility

title: RuneScape API 2.2.5
changes: Improved Linux compatibility

title: RuneScape API 2.2.4
changes: Modernise Launcher appearance

title: RuneScape API 2.2.3
changes: Add auto-update ability to NXT Launcher
Allow macOS to run multiple instances of RuneScape

title: RuneScape API 2.2.2
changes: Remove old registry keys correctly in installer
Don't display 'old graphics drivers' warning if we can't tell how old they are

title: RuneScape API 2.2.1
changes: Install for all users on Windows, to avoid issues with icons not appearing if installed by elevated user (and other similar problems)
Improve behaviour when closed before the client has started up properly

title: RuneScape API 2.2.0
changes: Fix crash on startup when graphics drivers are out of date

title: RuneScape API 2.1.9
changes: Make Cmd-Q and Quit menu/dock options close the launcher correctly on OSX (and Alt-F4 on linux)

title: RuneScape API 2.1.8
changes: Display prompt to update GPU drivers when they are old
Allow users to hold down 's' to select default graphics options on startup
Allow users to switch between ANGLE and OpenGL manually
Improve error reporting a bit on Windows
Fix some shutdown bugs on OSX

title: RuneScape API 2.1.7
changes: Fix keys being stuck down when switching focus on OSX

title: RuneScape API 2.1.6
changes: Intel Westmere chipsets auto-detect to run under ANGLE.
Install Visual Studio Redistributable 2015 Update 2 in installer, rather than Update 0 (and require it to be installed)

title: RuneScape API 2.1.5
changes: Launcher now remembers Window positions per instance.

title: RuneScape API 2.1.4
changes: Remove UAC checking in favour of better validation of permissions.
Improve timeouts when downloading the client (fixes error (13,28)).
Make the installer reject Windows XP < SP3.
Install DirectX 9 in more cases when it is needed.
Fix various linux graphics problems.

title: RuneScape API 2.1.3
changes: Improve error reporting slightly.

title: RuneScape API 2.1.2
changes: Some tweaks to the Ubuntu package.

title: RuneScape API 2.1.1
changes: Detect Skylake Intel HD GPUs, and force the use of ANGLE, due to various artefacts exhibited in OpenGL mode.
Allow the Windows installer to remove the cache on uninstall.

title: RuneScape API 2.1.0
changes: Fix issues with paths and filenames with non-latin characters.
Fix issues with creating cache folders in root of a drive.
Fix problems with fullscreen blocking Start Menu and Alt-Tab.
Fix some UAC problems on older versions of Windows.
Give more informative error messages when there are Launcher problems.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.9
changes: Add an x64 ANGLE build for Windows.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.8
changes: Fix crash on Mac.
Don't allow startup if the process is in an elevated UAC state on Windows.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.7
changes: Fix language selection for Dutch and Spanish computers.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.6
changes: Fix issue with going back to fullscreen the next time you load the client.
Fix issue where first visit to fullscreen would leave client in odd size.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.5
changes: Improve backwards compatibility.
Fix language and cache/settings folder configuration.
Improve progress bars.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.4
changes: Allow configuration of cache and settings folders.
Improve speed of Launcher initialization.
Added quit confirmation when logged into game.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.3
changes: Auto-detect whether ANGLE build is required, and run accordingly.
Fix detection of C++ runtime in Windows installer.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.2
changes: Make Linux version work.
Better loading progress.
Fix some focus issues.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.1
changes: Initial release.

title: RuneScape API 2.2.12
changes: Update RuneScape Logo

title: RuneScape API 2.2.11
changes: Fetch jav_config via https (changed from http)

title: Hamiltonian mechanics
headings: === From Euler–Lagrange equation to Hamilton's equations ===
=== From stationary action principle to Hamilton's equations ===
== Hamiltonian as the total system energy  ==
=== Application to systems of point masses ===
== Hamiltonian of a charged particle in an electromagnetic field ==
== From symplectic geometry to Hamilton's equations ==
=== Generalization to quantum mechanics through Poisson bracket ===
math_nodes: <math display="block">E_{\mathcal L}(\boldsymbol{q},\boldsymbol{\dot q},t)\, \stackrel{\text{def}}{=}\, \sum^n_{i=1} \dot q^i \frac{\partial \mathcal L}{\partial \dot q^i} - \mathcal L.</math>

<math display="block">
 \mathcal H{\left(\frac{\partial \mathcal L}{\partial \boldsymbol{\dot q}},\boldsymbol{q},t\right)} = E_{\mathcal L}(\boldsymbol{q},\boldsymbol{\dot q},t)
</math>

<math display="block">
 \mathcal H(\boldsymbol{p},\boldsymbol{q},t) = \sum^n_{i=1} p_i\dot q^i - \mathcal L(\boldsymbol{q},\boldsymbol{\dot q},t),
</math>
